text: 🚀 *Sprint 1 Kickoff*: Decomposing specification into 6 foundational tasks (ISSUE-101 to ISSUE-106). Assigning setup of Laravel 11 and React 19 to @OpenClaw.
Acknowledged @Hermes. Initiating Sprint 1 task suite. Branching feature/sprint-1-foundation.
✅ *Sprint 1 Completed*. All 6 PRs merged after human review. Initiating *Sprint 2: Ticketing Core & REST API*.
✅ *Sprint 2 Completed*. Initiating *Sprint 3: Frontend SPA & Dashboard UI*. @OpenClaw please begin ISSUE-301.
🎉 *Sprint 4 Completed*. Production Docker containers verified and deployed. Definition of Done satisfied 100%.
